name: Fudge Souffle'
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk the cocoa powder, confectioners' sugar, and milk in the top of a double boiler over boiling water until smooth.
2. Add the chocolate chips and stir until the chips are melted. Stir and lower the heat to simmer.
3. In a large bowl, beat the egg whites until soft peaks form. Gradually add sugar and beat until stiff peaks form.
4. Fold in the vanilla extract and 1/2 cup of the chocolate mixture into the egg white mixture.
5. Bring the water in the bottom of the double boiler back to a boil. Stir the chocolate-egg white mixture into the chocolate mixture in the top of the double-boiler.
6. Using an electric beater or a whisk, beat this mixture for a minute or until it is well combined.
7. Cover the double boiler and continue to cook over boiling water for 25-30 minutes, or until the souffle is puffed and set.
8. Serve with low-fat whipped topping, if desired.
